tasks.instruction: Schedule the earliest available weekday morning 60-minute initial evaluation for a new patient between March 10 and March 14, 2026, choosing the earliest time slot between 9:00am and 11:00am, and submit the appointment form with the provided contact details and reason for visit.

tasks.instruction: On the Rates & Insurance page, locate the BlueCross plan described as an entry-level PPO with moderate deductibles and coinsurance for physical therapy, use the calculator to apply 60% coverage to the listed price for a 60-minute initial evaluation, and save a note with this estimated out-of-pocket cost.

criteria.plan_description_contains: Entry-level PPO plan with moderate deductibles and coinsurance for outpatient physical therapy.

tasks.instruction: Search the blog for shoulder-related articles published on or after January 1, 2023, sort the results by newest first, and add the first three shoulder articles to your reading list.
